summary: Russian sources claim that American humanoid robots, referred to as "Terminators," have been delivered to Ukraine and are already in combat, sparking concern among Russian officials. Ukrainian forces are employing advanced FPV drone tactics, including coordinated strikes, fiber-optic link drones, and targeting enemy personnel and equipment such as air defense systems. The enemy is adapting by using log-periodic directional antennas on drones, increasing range and resistance to jamming, and Ukrainian pilots are experimenting with new methods to neutralize Russian forces. Iranian-backed militias have also conducted FPV drone attacks on US bases in Iraq, highlighting the expanding use of these systems beyond the Ukraine conflict.
